overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, busy traffic with futuristic vehicles, and reflective wet pavement. The scene showcases high-end game engine graphics with vibrant artificial lighting and modern glass architecture.

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with a tall cylindrical tower marked 04 visible ahead. The camera turns left and begins walking along a wet concrete sidewalk, passing yellow street lights while a beige sports car drives by on the busy multi-lane street.

segments.scene_description: Walking toward the prominent El Coyote Cojo billboard, the scene features palm trees lining the street and sparse pedestrian traffic beginning to appear. The glass office towers on the left grow larger as the camera approaches the billboard structure.

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the massive billboard structure as pedestrian traffic increases. A woman in a green jacket walks past in the opposite direction, and the palm trees shift to the right side of the frame while a green metal railing appears along the sidewalk edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: close-up view of buildings with bright purple and blue neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard, the camera continues through a moderately crowded section of the sidewalk. Neon storefronts with bright purple and blue lighting become prominent on the left, while pedestrians including a man on his phone walk past in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk intersection that gradually transitions into a dense corridor of glass architecture and commercial signage. It begins at a busy city crossing facing a tall cylindrical tower marked 04, before the camera turns left to walk along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath yellow street lights. As a beige sports car speeds past on the multi-lane street, the perspective shifts toward a line of palm trees and a growing number of pedestrians. The scene then expands as the glass office towers on the left loom larger, drawing the camera closer to a prominent El Coyote Cojo billboard.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from beneath a towering advertisement into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by passing under a massive billboard structure as pedestrian traffic increases and a woman in a green jacket walks past in the opposite direction. As the camera moves forward, the palm trees shift to the right side of the frame and a green metal railing emerges along the edge of the sidewalk. The scene then opens into a moderately crowded section of the street where the environment shifts toward a dense array of neon storefronts glowing with bright purple and blue light. Finally, the camera continues its path past various pedestrians, including a man on his phone, as the artificial lighting of the city becomes the dominant visual focus.
